requests.author: Zach Watson
requests.text: Does anyone have a discovery call for Risk I can listen to?

requests.author: Jacob Chalfin
requests.text: Does anyone have an example of a due diligence risk/vendor risk report we've produced? Or at least a sample for prospects?

requests.author: Jo
requests.text: Does anyone have a shareable link to the risk intro video from this LinkedIn post, so I can link it in an email without going via LinkedIn?

requests.author: Zach Watson
requests.text: Hello team — does anyone have a risk dashboard proposal they are proud of?

requests.author: Luize Lazdane
requests.text: L&G have asked to speak to someone who already takes our risk offering — any suggestions for who to put forward?

requests.author: Hannah Hart
requests.text: Does anyone have an email template they sent to a customer asking to be intro'd to their risk team?

requests.author: Jo
requests.text: Anyone got any good examples of ad hoc or post campaign summary style reports?

requests.author: RJ Zayas
requests.text: Does anyone have the PayPal CEO insights?

requests.author: RJ Zayas
requests.text: Does anyone have examples of Social 360 work looking at policy makers globally + spikes/trends in social outlets for key regulation and policy influencers?

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: Does anyone have anything that is insightful from a recent Pharma report?

requests.author: Will Price
requests.text: Hi team, does anyone have some nice looking media impact report examples we can share (white labelled)?

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: Yahoo have requested examples of monthly and quarterly impact reports. Does anyone have examples of two reports?

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: Does anyone have a slide on media impact reports I can use?

requests.author: Jo
requests.text: Does anyone have any examples where clients have mapped website traffic/similar data against media metrics?

requests.author: Luize Lazdane
requests.text: Does anyone have a recorded call where the in-app risk dashboards were demo'd please? Any stage will do.

requests.author: Zach Watson
requests.text: Does anyone have any good social reports and/or daily newsletters that weave in social with traditional that I can share externally?

requests.author: Frederico Pinto
requests.text: Does anyone have a good blinded Social report with engagement metrics I can share with a client?

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: Does anyone have any solid examples of earnings reports? We have the Airbnb example, but keen to see if there is anything else?

requests.author: Zach Watson
requests.text: S&P global is asking for existing newsletters where we separate the coverage thematically (DEI, private credit, AI, ESG, etc). Does anyone have something like this?

requests.author: Amelia Fuell
requests.text: Does anyone know what % of the wider social media universe is covered by Premium Social? This is for a £500k RFP with Unilever.

requests.author: Will Phillips
requests.text: Please could the Buyer Pack be updated to include our new address?

requests.author: Jo
requests.text: Does anyone have a copy of the standard support brief builder please for new/incoming clients?

requests.author: Jacob Flaxman
requests.text: Hi all, does anyone have an up to date version of our buyer pack? The links to the Order Form and Terms aren't working.

requests.author: Mamta Bains
requests.text: Does anyone have a template for an organogram that may have been used for a pitch or an RFP?

requests.author: Jacob Chalfin
requests.text: Does anyone have a deck that highlights the importance of the CCO role or that validates that CCOs are integral to business success?

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: I was going through Kodak's Gong presentation to Roblox and came across a template. Does anyone know where I can find these slide templates?

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: Does anyone have the Apple example deck from last week?

requests.author: Bailee Mesite
requests.text: Does anyone have a proposal they can share that includes Rep Reports + Modular Analytics?

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: Does anyone have a proposal for a small opp? webapp only - $30k. Just looking for a template.

requests.author: Michael E
requests.text: Does anyone have the latest and greatest Risk only deck for pitching — I have seen a number of new slides recently but nothing succinct.

requests.author: Zach Watson
requests.text: Does anyone have insight slides for DEI and Washington DC/political landscape?

requests.author: Faryn Corey
requests.text: Does anyone have a good slide/one pager on 'future roadmap'? This one feels a bit outdated now that we have askAIQ and advanced analytics.

requests.author: Zach Watson
requests.text: I don't see any Propel pitch decks in the shared folder. Would love an overview slide or 2 as part of our pitch deck flow.

requests.author: Will Price
requests.text: Hi team, does anyone have any slides outlining Propel's proposition?

requests.author: Peter Read
requests.text: Does anyone know where I can find our latest product roadmap slides? I have a workshop with an at-risk client.

requests.author: Michael E
requests.text: Does anyone have a client who moved to Signal AI from Valona Intelligence/M-Brain? Looking for someone to offer as a reference.

requests.author: Jacob Flaxman
requests.text: Can anyone point me in the direction of a hospitality client who gets curated newsletters, please?

requests.author: Jacob Flaxman
requests.text: Can anyone let me know any clients we have based in or with significant operations in Israel, please?

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: Does anyone have a connection to Apple? Looking for a way in.

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: Does anyone have a comms contact at Costco? They seem to intentionally hide their comms team from the outside world.

requests.author: Hannah Hart
requests.text: Does anyone have an email template they sent to a customer asking to be intro'd to their risk team?

requests.author: Luize Lazdane
requests.text: L&G have asked to speak to someone who already takes our risk offering — does anyone have good suggestions for who to put forward?

requests.author: Jo
requests.text: Anyone know of any customers who have used Public Relay and might be happy to speak to their experience/why Signal is better?

requests.author: Michael E
requests.text: Does anyone have senior contacts in the comms team at US Bancorp? We got put forward for an RFP and they want to run it through procurement.

requests.author: Jacob Flaxman
requests.text: Can anyone help me answer this from Barclays? Either with recent RFP submission docs or similar write-ups provided to clients.

requests.author: Zach Watson
requests.text: Anyone know how much Alpha Sense is?

requests.author: RJ Zayas
requests.text: Does anyone know what types of reporting businesses receive from AlphaSense and Bloomberg Terminal? I have a prospect who oversees IR.

requests.author: Tom Denn
requests.text: Trying to collect data on wins vs non-comms specific services e.g. Everbridge, Dataminr, Alphasense — does anyone have specific examples?

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: Does anyone have any decent word/google doc RFI responses for everything we do? Ideally for finance.

requests.author: Amelia Fuell
requests.text: Hi team, does anyone know if Memo cover any UK or global publications or is it just US?

requests.author: Peter Read
requests.text: Does anyone have the Tableau login for the marketplace dashboard please?

requests.author: RJ Zayas
requests.text: I'm rethinking account mapping. Does anyone have suggestions on how they map accounts, detail important information, and targeting approach?

requests.author: Faryn Corey
requests.text: Hey team, does anyone have the up to date API framework link (not the modular analytics one)?

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: Does anyone know the answers to these security questions? Nothing in our security docs.

requests.author: Zach Watson
requests.text: Does anyone have an updated W9 for 2025, or is 2024 ok?

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: Does anyone have a doc with our banking info on it? Deposit information and a point of contact for deposit communications.

requests.author: Jo
requests.text: Does anyone have the pre-sales insights link please?

requests.author: Zach Watson
requests.text: Does anyone have language for a 30 day break clause to an addendum?

requests.author: Rich Hope
requests.text: Does anyone know how to create groups in Gong to speed things up? The workflow from Sales Nav to Apollo to Gong is a massive pain.

requests.author: Will Price
requests.text: Does anyone know if we have previously signed up to the UNGM (United Nations Global Marketplace) and if so what our UNGM number is?
